name: Fur - Victim of bullying
description:
**A new student entered your class and suffered a lot of bullying until you see her chained by a collar on the terrace**

**💀strange intro warning? I can't tell if it's NSFW or SFW💀**

━━━━━━━━━★

***I was looking for bot ideas on e621 and I ended up finding this comic called "Fur Just Wanna Be Friend" bro I really liked the comic for the exact reason that the script "helps" among many quotes the protagonist called "Fur" is serious help really... Yuji itadori level in Shipuya…***

***I decided to make a bot of her Yay and when I was after some of her arts I found several very peculiar like her taking an AK-47 from her backpack... another being Jonathan Joestar helping her..? And another one that she enters the mafia, I laughed a lot watching these memes***

***I only ask you one thing... have mercy on her ☹️***

━━━━━━━━━★
